summary: Iteration 13 - P2 Features Testing: In-Memory Caching Layer, Lazy Loading, PWA Push Notifications. All 22/22 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend testing successful - login, dashboard, navigation, lazy loading, notification bell all working.

issues: Hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <tbody>. Does not break functionality - cosmetic warning only.

critical_code_review_comments: Cache service implementation is correct - TTLCache with short(30s), medium(5min), long(30min) durations
Cache decorator @cached working correctly for rooms, analytics KPI, revenue KPI endpoints
Notification API endpoints properly implemented - /today, /subscribe, /unsubscribe, /send-test all working
Service worker has push event handler and notificationclick handler as expected
Lazy loading with React.lazy() and Suspense fallback spinner working on all lazy-loaded pages
Notification bell in sidebar with data-testid='notification-bell' correctly implemented

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, dashboard, navigation, lazy loading, notification bell all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified 3 P2 features: (1) In-Memory Caching Layer - Cache API endpoints /api/cache/stats and /api/cache/clear working. Caching verified on /api/rooms (medium cache), /api/analytics/dashboard/kpi (short cache), /api/revenue/kpi (short cache). After clearing cache and calling endpoint twice, cache stats show hits=1 as expected. (2) Lazy Loading - All lazy-loaded pages (RoomsPage, GuestsPage, AnalyticsPage, etc.) show Suspense fallback spinner during load. React.lazy() with Suspense working correctly. (3) PWA Push Notifications - Notification bell in sidebar footer with data-testid='notification-bell', shows 'Bildirimleri Ac' text. Service worker at /service-worker.js contains push event handler and notificationclick handler. Notification APIs /api/notifications/today, /subscribe, /send-test all working.

caching_verification.rooms: PASS - GET /api/rooms twice shows 1 cache hit
caching_verification.analytics_kpi: PASS - GET /api/analytics/dashboard/kpi twice shows 1 cache hit
caching_verification.revenue_kpi: PASS - GET /api/revenue/kpi twice shows 1 cache hit

cache_durations.long: 30 minutes TTL - static config, pricing seasons

lazy_loading.implementation: React.lazy() with Suspense wrapper in App.js

api_endpoints.GET /api/notifications/today: PASS - Returns date, total, checkins, checkouts, notifications array
api_endpoints.POST /api/notifications/send-test: PASS - Returns success with notification object

mocked_apis_list: Push notifications use browser Notification API (no VAPID server-side push)
